MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar and dissolved/fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion For Protective Order In Opposition To Defense Oral Examination In Conjunction With Physical Examination; Proof Of Service
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Michael Padway, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: Stephen Jenner
Melissa L. Edgecombe, Esq., for Defendant and opposing party: Silvia Rivera

After hearing, Plaintiff Stephen Jenner's Motion For Protective Order In Opposition To Defense Oral Examination In Conjunction With Physical Examination is Granted. The IME physician shall be supplied with pertinent medical records; and the transcript of the deposition of, any written statements by plaintiff pertaining to the accident, not less than 5 days prior to IME. The examining doctor may inquire concerning the mechanics of plaintiff's injury/accident to the limited extent necessary to clarify statements in, or not covered by the deposition testimony or medical records. Similarly, the doctor may inquire about physical complaints, symptoms or treatment since plaintiff's deposition; and may inquire concerning plaintiff's responses or reactions to any aspects of the physical examination. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
